_comment: Bazel http_archive and http_file deps in any deps/**/*.MODULE.bazel file that intentionally have no Renovate customManager. Every entry MUST include a non-empty rationale. The check is enforced by tasks/check_renovate_bazel_coverage.py and the validate-renovate-deps.yml workflow. As deps move from this allowlist to a customManager in renovate.json, remove the entry here in the same PR.

intentionally_untracked.openssl: Pending tracking in Phase 2a (github-releases batch). Blocked by openssl drift cleanup (AIX 3.5.5, MSI 3.5).
intentionally_untracked.krb5: Pending tracking in Phase 2b (tricky-tag batch — tag krb5-X.Y.Z-final differs from tarball).
intentionally_untracked.rpm: Pending tracking in Phase 2b (tricky-tag batch — strip_prefix is rpm-rpm-X.Y.Z-release).
intentionally_untracked.systemd: Pending tracking in Phase 2b (tricky-tag batch — single-integer versioning, loose).
intentionally_untracked.openssl_fips: Pending tracking in Phase 2b. Will be added with `enabled: false` — pinned to 3.0.9 for FIPS 140-2 validation, must NOT auto-update.
intentionally_untracked.sqlite3: Hard: version is split across a tuple (sqlite_ver = ("3", "53", "00")) and embeds a release-year directory in the URL. Needs a refactor to a single literal before a Renovate regex can target it cleanly. Phase 3.
intentionally_untracked.bzip2: Hard: sourceware.org tarballs; no native Renovate datasource. Needs a customDatasource. Phase 3.
intentionally_untracked.attr: Hard: hosted on Savannah (savannah.nongnu.org); no native Renovate datasource. Needs a customDatasource. Phase 3.
intentionally_untracked.gpg-error: Hard: hosted on gnupg.org FTP; no native Renovate datasource. Needs a customDatasource. Phase 3.
intentionally_untracked.gcrypt: Hard: hosted on gnupg.org FTP; no native Renovate datasource. Needs a customDatasource. Phase 3.
intentionally_untracked.unixodbc: Hard: hosted on unixodbc.org; no native Renovate datasource. Needs a customDatasource. Phase 3.
intentionally_untracked.acl: Pending tracking. Hosted on Savannah (download.savannah.nongnu.org); needs a customDatasource. Phase 3.
intentionally_untracked.curl: Pending tracking in Phase 2a (github-releases batch). Tarball is on curl.haxx.se but releases are tagged on github.com/curl/curl.
intentionally_untracked.cpython: Pending tracking in Phase 2a (github-releases batch). Released on python.org; corresponding GitHub tags exist at github.com/python/cpython.
intentionally_untracked.freetds: Pending tracking in Phase 2a (github-releases batch). Tarballs on freetds.org; releases tagged at github.com/FreeTDS/freetds.
intentionally_untracked.libpcap: Pending tracking in Phase 2a (github-releases batch). Tarball on tcpdump.org; releases tagged at github.com/the-tcpdump-group/libpcap.
intentionally_untracked.nfsiostat: Pending tracking in Phase 2c. Hosted on kernel.org mirrors (no GitHub mirror with reliable tags). Needs a customDatasource.
intentionally_untracked.openscap: Pending tracking in Phase 2a (github-releases batch). Released at github.com/OpenSCAP/openscap.
intentionally_untracked.setuptools: Pending tracking in Phase 2a (github-releases batch). Released at github.com/pypa/setuptools.
intentionally_untracked.compile_policy_x86_64: Pending tracking in Phase 2a. DataDog/dd-policy-engine GitHub release; will be tracked as one bundle with the arm64 and windows variants since they share VERSION.
intentionally_untracked.compile_policy_arm64: Pending tracking in Phase 2a. Shares VERSION with compile_policy_x86_64; tracked together.
intentionally_untracked.compile_policy_windows_x86_64: Pending tracking in Phase 2a. Shares VERSION with compile_policy_x86_64; tracked together.
intentionally_untracked.gstatus_binary: Pending tracking in Phase 2a (github-releases batch). Released at github.com/gluster/gstatus.
intentionally_untracked.msodbcsql18_deb_amd64: Pending tracking. Microsoft .deb package; no native datasource for packages.microsoft.com. Both arches share VERSION and will be tracked as one bundle when a customDatasource is added. Phase 3.
intentionally_untracked.msodbcsql18_deb_arm64: Pending tracking. Shares VERSION with msodbcsql18_deb_amd64; tracked together. Phase 3.
intentionally_untracked.snmp_traps: Intentionally untracked. Datadog-internal SNMP traps DB published to dd-agent-omnibus S3; no public upstream to watch. Bumped manually when the traps DB is regenerated.
intentionally_untracked.cacert_pem: Intentionally untracked. Bumped via a separate Datadog Synthetics-driven workflow (see deps/cacerts/cacerts.MODULE.bazel) that alerts team-agent-build on header changes; auto-PRs from Renovate would race that flow.
intentionally_untracked.cacert_license: Intentionally untracked. Mozilla MPL-2.0 license text accompanying cacert_pem; updated together with cacert_pem via the same out-of-band flow.
intentionally_untracked.sqlite3_license: Intentionally untracked here — version is pinned via the shared sqlite_ver tuple in deps/repos.MODULE.bazel and will be tracked together with sqlite3 once that refactor lands (see sqlite3 entry).
intentionally_untracked.sqlite_win: Intentionally untracked here. Windows-only SQLite amalgamation; pinned to the same release as sqlite3 (manually kept in sync, see TODO in deps/cpython/cpython.MODULE.bazel). Will be folded in with sqlite3 in Phase 3.
intentionally_untracked.bzip2_win: Pending tracking. Loop-emitted Windows variant in deps/cpython/cpython.MODULE.bazel; version pinned via the python_src_deps dict alongside the base bzip2. Will be tracked together with bzip2 (Phase 3 customDatasource).
intentionally_untracked.mpdecimal_win: Pending tracking. Loop-emitted Windows variant in deps/cpython/cpython.MODULE.bazel; version pinned via the python_src_deps dict. No upstream `mpdecimal` dep exists today — needs its own customManager.
intentionally_untracked.xz_win: Pending tracking. Loop-emitted Windows variant in deps/cpython/cpython.MODULE.bazel; version pinned via the python_src_deps dict alongside the base xz. Will be tracked together with xz (Phase 2a).
intentionally_untracked.zlib_win: Pending tracking. Loop-emitted Windows variant in deps/cpython/cpython.MODULE.bazel; version pinned via the python_src_deps dict alongside the base zlib. Will be tracked together with zlib (Phase 2a).
intentionally_untracked.libffi_win: Pending tracking. Loop-emitted Windows variant in deps/cpython/cpython.MODULE.bazel; version pinned via the python_bin_deps dict. Note: pinned to 3.4.4 (cpython-bin-deps), independent of the base libffi version — must be tracked separately.
intentionally_untracked.tcltk_win: Pending tracking. Loop-emitted Windows variant in deps/cpython/cpython.MODULE.bazel; version pinned via the python_bin_deps dict. No upstream `tcltk` dep — needs its own customManager (cpython-bin-deps tags).
intentionally_untracked.agent_data_plane_linux-amd64: Pending tracking. New dep from the ADP Bazel migration; releases are published at github.com/DataDog/saluki. All 8 platform variants share VERSION and will be tracked together.
intentionally_untracked.agent_data_plane_linux-arm64: Shares VERSION with agent_data_plane_linux-amd64; tracked together.
intentionally_untracked.agent_data_plane_fips-linux-amd64: Shares VERSION with agent_data_plane_linux-amd64; tracked together.
intentionally_untracked.agent_data_plane_fips-linux-arm64: Shares VERSION with agent_data_plane_linux-amd64; tracked together.
intentionally_untracked.agent_data_plane_darwin-amd64: Shares VERSION with agent_data_plane_linux-amd64; tracked together.
intentionally_untracked.agent_data_plane_darwin-arm64: Shares VERSION with agent_data_plane_linux-amd64; tracked together.
intentionally_untracked.agent_data_plane_windows-amd64: Shares VERSION with agent_data_plane_linux-amd64; tracked together.
intentionally_untracked.agent_data_plane_windows-amd64-fips: Shares VERSION with agent_data_plane_linux-amd64; tracked together.
